{{Quote|Well, he's to be commended for following orders even at the cost of considerable pain. Give him a commendation, and when he gets out of the medical ward, give him a three-day leave|[[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] regarding Yorlin|<ref name="X-Wing: Iron Fist">''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]''</ref>}}
'''Yorlin''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] that served aboard the [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']] under [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]].

==History==
When members of [[Wraith Squadron]]—under the guise of the [[Hawk-bat Independent Space Force]]—visited the [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|Iron Fist]], Yorlin was one of the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] that made sure the visitors were not armed before meeting [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]. Yorlin searched [[Kell Tainer|Dissek]]—the alias used by [[Kell Tainer]]—and was knocked unconscious by the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. Dissek claimed that it was just his reflex action at being prodded. Yorlin suffered a concussion and damage to some of his teeth at the encounter.

When Zsinj heard of the incident, he asked [[General/Legends|General]] [[Melvar]] to commend Yorlin for following orders and was given a three day leave effective after his discharge from the medical ward.

{{Char-stub}}
